# Hikube Documentation

> Hikube est une plateforme cloud souveraine suisse proposant du Kubernetes managé, des GPU NVIDIA, des VMs, du stockage S3, des bases de données et du messaging. Triple réplication sur 3 datacenters suisses. Conforme nLPD/RGPD, immunisé au CLOUD Act.

## Démarrer

- [Accueil](https://docs.hikube.cloud/)
- [Introduction à Hikube](https://docs.hikube.cloud/getting-started/introduction/)
- [Concepts clés](https://docs.hikube.cloud/getting-started/concepts/)
- [Démarrage rapide](https://docs.hikube.cloud/getting-started/quick-start/)

## Kubernetes managé

- [Vue d'ensemble](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/kubernetes/overview/)
- [Concepts](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/kubernetes/concepts/)
- [Démarrage rapide](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/kubernetes/quick-start/)
- [Plugins : Cilium, CoreDNS, Ingress NGINX, Cert-Manager, FluxCD, Velero](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/kubernetes/plugins/cilium/)
- [API Reference](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/kubernetes/api-reference/)
- [FAQ](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/kubernetes/faq/)
- [Dépannage](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/kubernetes/troubleshooting/)

## GPU as a Service

- [Vue d'ensemble](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/overview/)
- [Concepts](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/concepts/)
- [Démarrage rapide](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/quick-start/)
- [Provisionner un GPU sur Kubernetes](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/how-to/provision-gpu-kubernetes/)
- [Provisionner un GPU sur VM (Passthrough)](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/how-to/provision-gpu-vm/)
- [API Reference](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/api-reference/)
- [FAQ](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/faq/)
- [Dépannage](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/gpu/troubleshooting/)

- [MySQL](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/databases/mysql/overview/)
- [Redis](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/databases/redis/overview/)
- [ClickHouse](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/databases/clickhouse/overview/)

## Messaging managé

- [Vue d'ensemble](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/messaging/)
- [Kafka](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/messaging/kafka/overview/)
- [RabbitMQ](https://docs.hikube.cloud/services/messaging/rabbitmq/overview/)
